parts.prompt:
Task: redesign snake_tail_base.png for a snake skin.
Hard lock: keep shape and silhouette exactly the same as template orange-jelly-snake (snake_tail_base.png).
Only replace color/material/texture. Do not change contour or proportions.
No style image provided; create new material from text notes.
Body/tail part: no face elements.
Background must be pure solid color: #00ff00.
Global design note (highest priority): none.
Main style prompt: 1. Update the classic-burrow prototype to match the style reference image's colors and textures. The overall aesthetic should be casual, cute, refined, and chibi-cartoon.
2. Keep classic-burrow's expression. Minor detail adjustments for beautification are allowed, but no major changes.
3. No snakeskin texture. Use the texture from the style reference image..
Extra user note: none.
